deliveries.commentary: full and wide outside off. Kishan throws his hands at it and flays it towards backward point, where Ranjane flies to his right and saves four
length just outside off, shaping back in. Gous presses half forward and pushes it towards extra cover
back of a length in the channel and this decks back sharply. Kishan nearly cut in half as he jams it off the inside edge into his body
peach! Devilish out-swinger, starting on a length on off and then swerving away. Gous wafts at it and gets nowhere close to it
oh! On a length in the channel and this nips back in sharply too. Kishan goes feeling for it and chunks an inside edge into his back leg
back of a length just outside off. Gous gets up on his toes and pats it into the off side
very full, very wide and shaping away. Gous swishes at it and misses

straight to deep cover, and there is a deafening silence at the Wankhede Stadium! This is superb field placement by USA. Back of a length outside off. Abhishek tries that trademark lofted back-foot punch and gets a decent piece of it too. Hits it flat but also straight to the sweeper. Could not have picked him out better in fairness, and India have been stunned early!
right out of the screws! Slot ball on middle and off, and this goes the distance. Free swing through the line and Gous obliterates it over the sightscreen!
back of a length on off. Tilak rises with the bounce, gets behind the line and defends
back of a length just outside off. Gous gets up on his toes and pats it into the off side
on a length just outside off. Tilak presses half forward and blocks
goes a mile up, and it goes all the way! First sign of aggression from Tilak. Length ball just outside off. Tilak hares down and launches it over mid off!

skewed up, and taken! Arshdeep on the board too, and the Wankhede Stadium is rocking! Full on the pads and this seems like the out-swinging. Moves away just a shade and that is enough to induce the leading edge. Monank wanted to work to leg but all he managed was a tame chip to mid off. India on the prowl!
back of a length, angling into the pads. Milind tucks it into the square leg region and saunters across to open his account
back of a length outside off and this skids through. Mukkamalla goes feeling for it and sees the ball whiz past the outside edge
length just outside off. Kishan presses forward and nudges it softly towards extra cover for another single
back of a length on middle and off. Mukkamalla hangs back and prods it tentatively into the off side
back of a length on middle and leg. Milind gets inside the line and glances it down to fine leg

scuffed to mid wicket, and Siraj is breaking the back of this batting unit! Slinked in full on middle and off. Nips in with the angle and Mukkamalla, trying to go downtown, mistimes it completely. The bat face closes upon impact and he pops it straight to Chakravarthy. India all over USA like a rash now!
Tilak well on truly on the charge now! Back of a length outside off. Tilak spots the length early and heaves it over mid wicket!
shortish outside off. Krishnamurthi rides the bounce before jabbing it into the off side. Single to deep backward point
speared across the batter very full and very wide. Tilak tries to hit it too hard and scuffs it towards mid off
angled in on a length on off. Milind gets everything behind the line of the ball and keeps it out
zipped in full on off. Tilak drives it crisply towards mid on. Another misfield and Tilak gets a single
Siraj flies to his right but cannot hold on! Length on off. Milind has a flay at it and the ball hurtles off the outside edge towards short third. Siraj does everything right apart from clinging on
slower ball dug into the track outside off. Kishan is late to pick it and wafts at fresh air
back of a length on off. Krishnamurthi opens his bat face and runs it down to short third

dropped again - oh dear! Slanted across the batter full and wide. Kishan gives it the lot and hits it like a bullet straight to backward point. In and out for Ranjane, though. That was a very presentable chance

length outside off. Milind nudges it towards short third and looks at his partner, who responds and dashes across. A direct hit may have made things interesting but reckon Krishnamurthi would have made it anyway
shortish just outside off. Skids off the surface and Tilak splices it towards mid wicket
length ball straying onto the pads. Milind tucks it towards deep backward square leg

slapped to mid off, and this time, USA do hold on! Kishan has to go! This is right in the slot outside off. Kishan gives it the big wind-up and absolutely middles it. But like Abhishek, he also picks out the fielder. That was travelling very quickly but Milind did well to soften the impact and gobble up the chance!
shorter and wider. Krishnamurthi stands up tall and times this back-foot punch well but he cannot beat cover point
back of a length on off. SKY gets behind the line and defends
back of a length, pitching outside off and cutting back in. Krishnamurthi has a waft at it and nearly drags it onto his stumps. The ball bobbles towards the keeper, allowing a single
length outside off. Pushed out towards extra cover
back of a length just outside off. Milind reads it off the pitch before dabbing it towards short third
back of a length on middle and leg. SKY goes back and knocks it to long on
googly on a back of a length on middle. Krishnamurthi goes back and helps it round the corner behind square
length ball on the pads. Rinku glances it towards short fine leg and gets off the mark
on a length outside off. Milind lunges forward and defends. That nearly slithered back onto the stumps
back of a length on off. SKY gets behind the line calmly and defends, denying SvS a piece of T20 WC history
a ripper to start off. Fired in on a length in and around off. Drifts in and then grips to rag past the outside edge. Extra bounce taking it beyond off stump
back of a length in the channel and this moves away a touch. SKY gets squared up and plonks it towards extra cover off the leading edge
darted in full on middle and leg. Milind comes forward and pokes it to long on
slower ball that lands in the slot outside off. SKY drives it neatly but picks out extra cover
in the air but safe! Given a bit of air on a full length outside off. Krishnamurthi has a wild swing at it and slices it just over extra cover
slider on a length just outside off. SKY comes forward and jabs it towards extra cover
lbw shout but that was probably going down leg! Incoming ball, on a back of a length on middle and off. Deviates in, raps the batter on the pads but was doing too much
googly on a length just outside off. SKY hangs back and poke it towards long on
dragged down on leg stump. Milind hops back and tugs it towards deep backward square leg
shortish on leg stump. Rinku has a swipe at it and chunks it off the inside edge towards short fine leg
back of a length outside off. Chopped straight to backward point
zipped in full on middle and off. SKY jabs it down the ground towards mid off
fullish just outside off. Krishnamurthi comes forward and pushes it towards extra cover
full outside off. Rinku reaches out for it and drives it past extra cover. Sweeper cover is square enough to cut it off, though
a touch shorter outside off. Krishnamurthi goes back and jabs it towards sweeper cover
up and over! SKY counter-punches, finally! Floaty full ball on middle and off. SKY plants his front foot and boshes it over mid off!
much fuller on the stumps. Drilled back to the bowler. Milind will feel he missed out there
back of a length, tucking up the batter on leg stump. Rinku knocks it towards long on
streaky but they all count! Length ball outside off and this straightens against the angle. Milind flashes hard at it and the ball flies off the outside edge through the vacant slip region!
fizzed through on a fullish length on off. Straightens and SKY, nibbling at it, edges it down to short third
almost a wicket again! Seems like a change-up banged in outside off. Milind swipes at it and nearly chops it onto his stumps
juicy full toss just outside off. Rinku winds up but can only flat-bat it towards long on

lbw shout, but the ump is not interested! Back of a length just outside off. Decks back in and raps Milind on the pad as he plays all around it. Seemed to be high, but India, after a bit of deliberation, have gone upstairs. Umpire signaled leg-bye, it must be added, and that signal came before India opted for the DRS. No bat involved but Ball Tracking reckons the ball would have sailed over middle stump. Milind stays and India burn a review!
googly on a back of a length outside off. Rinku chops it into the off side
fired in full on middle and off. Milind gets down on the sweep and hacks it towards short fine. Has to hurtle to complete the single too
shorter and wider outside off. Rinku throws his hands at it and slaps it towards sweeper cover
India starting to bleed runs now! This is short, wide and deserving to be hit. Not off the middle but Krishnamurthi finds the gap between short third and backward point!
zinged in full on middle and off. SKY walks across, gets down on one knee and sweeps it powerfully towards deep backward square leg
googly ona  fullish length outside off. Krishnamurthi comes forward and nudges it enough to sweeper cover's right for a brace
pushed in on a back of a length on off. Hardik stays back and taps it gently into the off side
hard length on off. Skids through to the batter, who can only dab it straight to backward point
Hardik with his first boundary! Welcome runs these! This is given a bit more air and fuller on off stump. Hardik skips down and threads it to extra cover's left!
safe again! Length ball outside off. Krishnamurthi throws his hands at it and slices it on the bounce to sweeper cover
shortish outside off. Hardik throws his hands at it and slices it towards short third
back of a length outside off. Nips back in, tucks up the batter a touch and Ranjane scuffs it towards extra cover
flighted up full just outside off. SKY gets down on one knee, rolls his wrists and helps it past short fine leg for a couple of runs
Krishnamurthi goes massive again! Half-tracker on leg stump. Krishnamurthi rocks back, opens up his stance and whacks it over cow corner!
full on the pads. SKY gets forward and flicks it perfectly between long on and deep mid wicket. Back for a brace
back of a length on middle and off. Krishnamurthi nurdles it into the mid wicket region
right in the gap again! On a length outside off. SKY gets down on one knee early and thunders a sweep between deep backward square leg and deep mid wicket!
slower on a length just outside off. Ranjane reaches out in front of his body and prods it towards deep mid wicket
fired in full on leg stump. SKY comes forward and turns it towards deep mid wicket
shortish on the hips. Krishnamurthi gets tucked up a bit and heaves it on the bounce to deep backward square leg
darted in full on off. Axar gets onto the front foot and pats it towards mid wicket

trapped right in front, and the finger goes up. But Ranjane has reviewed promptly! Googly on a fullish length just outside off. Ranjane mows across the line and the swiftness of the review suggests he may have gottena scratch on it. Clear spike as the ball is next to the bat, and Ranjane stays!
back of a length on the pads. Axar helps it into the square leg region and opens his account
leg-spinner on a length outside off. Ranjane comes forward and knocks it to long off
welcomed back with a boundary! This was asking to be hit too. Short, wide and Axar rides the bounce to crash it through point!
back of a length on middle and leg. Krishnamurthi drops it into the on side but there was no way Ranjane was getting across for that run
smart batting this! Back of a length outside off. Axar waits on it and then taps the ball on its head, gliding it fine of short third!

oh, this is going to bring snow! And it is eventually taken by Rinku! Tossed up a touch on a fullish length on off. Krishnamurthi has an enormous swipe at it and only gets the height he wants. Rinku runs in from deep mid wicket, circles under it, settles and then sends the set batter on his way. Big wicket for India!

more runs, albeit not a boundary. Slower ball on a back of a length outside off. Axar dabs it fine of short third but Ali Khan can track this down. Ali Khan might have hurt his groin in the process, and that is not a good sign for USA

Axar goes bang-bang, and USA losing their way now! Speared in full on leg stump. Harmeet thinks this is there in his arc and he unleashes the slog sweep. Does not get the elevation or the timing he wants, though, and Siraj accepts the offering gleefully inside the deep mid wicket fence. Axar on a hat-trick now!
zipped in full just outside off. Axar comes forward and digs it out to long on
shortish outside off. Axar opens his bat face and guides it towards short third
hard length outside off and this skids through. Ranjane rushed on the pull and he splices it towards long on
peach! Flighted up on a length outside off. Drifts in and then grips to rip away past SKY's flailing blade
back of a length just outside off. Mohsin has a belated nibble at it and is beaten for pace
fired in full on middle and off. SKY comes forward and drives it towards deep extra cover
a bit of width offered. Mohsin throws his hands at it and slices it towards deep backward point
speared in full but also well down leg. Axar lets it go and the umpire has no qualms in calling it a wide

SKY on the deck, ball hit into the fence, and everything feels normal for just this moment! Full toss wide outside off. SKY fetches it, ends up on the ground but still manages to swipe it behind square. Fifty up for the skipper too, but the job is not done yet!
back of a length on middle and leg. Mohsin backs away and hoicks it towards long on
low full toss outside off. SKY laces this cover drive but cannot get it past extra cover

slower bumper on middle and off. Ranjane swipes at it but does so too early. Off his body behind point. Did that hit his helmet? Mohsin, while all that was happening, had run half-way down and got sent back, and USA only got a run because of an overthrow
Ranjane sticks to his guns, hiding it on a length wide outside off. SKY looks for the sweep and misses, and the umpire calls it a wide. Harsh call on first glance
shortish and very wide outside off. Mohsin walks a mile across and gets enough purchase on his scoop to beat short fine to his left!
slower delivery banged in short outside off. SKY drags a pull to deep mid wicket
zinged in on a length way outside off. SKY backs away but backs away too much in the end. Not called a wide. Was inside the tramlines too
bashed half-way down outside off. SvS swings like a rusty gate and squirts it off the inside edge towards short fine leg
that is a shot and a half! Back of a length outside off. SKY rises with the bounce, stands tall and with a straight bat, lofts it over mid off!
excellent yorker honing into the toes. SvS chalks it into the square leg region and gets Ranjane back on strike
off-pace on a fullish length outside off. SKY is through his shot too early and shanks it towards long on
Ranjane keeps fighting! This has a sense of too little, too late, though. Juicy full toss outside off and Ranjane deposits it over deep mid wicket!
back of a length just outside off. A bit of movement back in again and Kishan, advancing, shanks it towards mid wicket
a touch shorter and finishing just outside off. Gous gets on top of the bounce before dropping it with soft hands into the off side
Ishan Kishan is up and running, at the fifth time of asking! Back of a length just outside off. Kishan drops down to one knee, picks it up and dumps it over deep backward square leg. Some shot that!
back of a length and swinging down leg. Gous does not get bat on it and Kishan dives to his left to collect
hard length just outside off. Kishan has a tentative nibble at it and squirts it off the inside edge just behind square. Could have chopped it into his stumps on another day
on a length on leg stump. Gous has a mow at it and misses, with the ball rolling off his thigh behind point

in the air, and snapped up sharply by Tilak! Back of a length outside off, and this seems to just stop a touch. Gous absolutely laces this back-foot punch but cannot keep it down fully. Tilak swoops down low at cover point and sends the USA opener on his way. Big early wicket for Siraj and of course, for India!
sharp bumper on leg stump and this climbs through. Tilak is rushed on the pull and ends up swatting away flies in the end
angled in on a length on middle and leg. Monank falls across and then plays all around it. Pings off the pad into the on side
fullish just outside off. Tilak tips it to mid on and dashes across to the other end. Just two off the over
a bit of width offered outside off. Mukkamalla throws his hands at it and flays it just over cover point. Off the mark with a brace
shortish outside off. Tilak gets up on his toes and jabs it towards extra cover
length outside off. Mukkamalla gets a better stride in and punches it on the up towards extra cover
another play and miss! Back of a length outside off and Mukkamalla is struggling to cope with the length and the movement. Another spar away from the body, and another ball that he gets beaten on
length ball hung up outside off. Tilak stands tall and drills it towards mid off, where Milind misfields while sliding to his right and allows the second
shortish outside off. Milind gets on top of the bounce and glides it towards deep backward point

well, that will go down as a chance! Back of a length outside off. Tilak winds up and smashes it back at the bowler, who got his hands to it near his chest. More of an evasive action, though. Tough to even call it a chance but it will technically go down as one...
banged in short outside off and this skips through. Krishnamurthi gauges it early enough and sways out of the way
banged in much shorter just outside leg. Kishan has a wild swipe at it and is awfully late on it. Wanted the wide too but the ump was having none of it
back of a length outside off. Krishnamurthi chops it towards deep backward point
finally gets one away! That should settle a few nerves for Kishan too. Half-volley laced with width and Kishan thrashes it between extra cover and cover point!
four vital runs! Bumper that climbs through on leg stump. Milind does not control it entirely but manages to hook it towards long leg. Rinku sprawls to his right but cannot quite prevent it!
serious whippage, and watch that ball fly! Pushed into the slot on middle and off. Kishan snaps his wrists into action and whips it over deep mid wicket!
back of a length just outside off. A bit of shape back in but Milind stays leg side of the ball to drop it behind point
on a length just outside off. SKY presses forward, stays on top of the bounce and punches it past the bowler to open his account
jaffa! Length ball in the fifth stump channel and this leaves the batter late. Milind goes fencing at it and is beaten all ends up

another splice, and another falls! Wankhede Stadium is a library now! Bashed into the track just outside off and this gets a little big on Tilak. He tries to mow it away but the lack of room, plus the slight extra bounce, means that he miscues it completely. Easiest of catches for the USA skipper at mid wicket, and India are three down inside the powerplay!
this is a superb shot! Shortish outside off and this time, Milind is up to the challenge. Opens his bat face late and steers it between backward point and short third!

two in two, and India are crumbling at the Wankhede! Slower ball banged into the track outside off and this just does not arrive. Dube plays three strokes in his head before trying to bail out of the fourth attempt. Cannot do so in time and the ball swirls off the top edge towards short fine. Netravalkar runs back and takes a smart overhead catch. India in all sorts now!
back of a length just outside off. Milind drops it into the backward point region and canters across
leg-spinner on a length just outside off. SKY comes forward and eases it to long off
fuller outside off. Milind gets closer to the ball and knocks it to long off
googly on a length outside off. Rinku seems to read it off the pitch and then swishes and misses
back of a length on the stumps. Played back to the bowler
length on off. Rinku goes right back, picks it off the pitch and defends
shorter and angling into the hips. Krishnamurthi hops back and hacks it behind square. Ambles back for a brace
hard length just outside off. SKY waits for the slower ball on his toes before punching it to long on
back of a length on middle and off. No room to work with and Milind taps it into the off side
back of a length outside off. Rinku uses the angle and dabs it towards short third
fuller on middle and leg. Milind's turn to hack at one, and he jams it off the inside edge into his back thigh
length ball on the pads. SKY presses half forward and tucks it off his pads towards deep mid wicket
length just outside off. Milind backs away and punches it towards extra cover, where Tilak misfields and ends up conceding a single
another drag-down, this time just outside off. Rinku hops back before cutting it towards backward point. Rinku will feel he missed out there
on the shorter side again, outside off. Krishnamurthi stands back and flat-bats it towards long on
back of a length outside off. Rinku waits for it before running it down to short third
short outside off. Milind opens his bat face nicely but cannot get it past short third. Good idea but not the best execution
well well! Slanted across on a length outside off. Rinku shapes for the reverse but makes a complete mess of it. No bat on ball in the end
googly on a back of a length just outside off. Milind hangs right back before defending
slanted in fuller and this is an on-pace ball on middle and off. SKY stabs it back to the bowler
no missing out this time! This is clean! Slot ball outside off and perfect to unleash the step-hit. Milind bends his back knee too and thumps this over the bowler's head!
clever, clever batting! Full, wide and the width is the problem for Ranjane. SKY opens his bat face and steers it between backward point and short third!

run out chance, but has Milind made it back?! Looks like he has! Angled into the stumps. Milind nurdles it behind point and sets off, only to be sent back. Has to scramble and does so in the nick of time!

did that carry?! It might just have! Fullish on middle and off, and this sticks in the surface slightly. SKY plonks it towards the bowler, who puts down a very presentable chance bending low. Got both hands to it too. In and out, like on an earlier occasion tonight for Ranjane
back of a length on leg stump. Milind backs away before punching it towards sweeper cover
oh dear - that is sloppy! Back of a length on middle and leg. SKY hops back and punches it towards deep mid wicket. SvS overruns it and makes a terrible mess of it!
back of a length outside off. Krishnamurthi reaches out for it and clinks it out towards deep point
floated up fuller and wider. SKY gets good purchase on the cover drive but cannot get it enough to extra cover's left
safe again! Dug into the track outside off. Milind stands up on his toes and flat-bats it on the bounce to long on
fullish on middle and leg. Draws SKY forward and then makes him stretch out, prodding it towards extra cover eventually
another short ball outside off. Krishnamurthi, belatedly, tries to upper-cut it and misses. Square leg umpire says it is too high to be deemed a legal ball

in the air, and into another fielder's palms! Rinku falls, and half the Indian side is now back in the shed! Tossed up nicely on a fullish length just outside off. Rinku's eyes light up and he thinks he can smash this over long on. Shanks it off the inside half of the bat, though, and long on, stationed well inside the fence, snares the chance. Rinku disappointed; USA, anything but!
back of a length just outside off. Comes in, cramps the batter and Krishnamurthi nearly jams it off the inside edge onto his stumps
flighted up full outside off. Hardik lunges forward and defends
very similar to the previous ball. A dart on a length just outside off. Krishnamurthi inside-edges it onto his pad and this time, the ball rolls further into the point region to allow a run
floated up fuller outside off. Hardik cannot get under it and drills it all along the carpet towards long off

Milind goes walkabouts and he pays the price! Fizzed through on a length outside off. Milind does not read it and gets cut in absolute half. Then, for some reason, he wanders down the track and Kishan, who fumbles initially, has all the time in the world to recover and whip off the bails. A bizarre way to get out but Chakarvarthy, as he so often does, breaks a crucial partnership!

Hardik bites the dust too, and this night goes from bad to worse for India! Could not have been going better for USA, though. This is on a shorter length outside off and the ball holds in the surface. Spins away too and Hardik, trying to carve it over extra cover, slices it rather meekly. Sweeper cover is placed exactly for that miscue, and India, believe it or not, are six down inside 13 overs!
off the mark with a boundary! Zipped into the slot just outside off. Ranjane plants his front foot and then whips it to long on's right!
darted in on a back of a length outside off. Grips in the surface and hits near the splice as Axar prods at it
off-pace and dug in short outside off. Ranjane hops back and pulls it towards deep mid wicket

huge appeal, but there may have been bat involved! Fizzed through on a fullish length just outside off. Axar gets caught on the crease and manages a scratch before the ball thuds into his pad. Good for him and India that he did
short and wide outside off. Krishnamurthi throws the lot at it and cuts it on the bounce to deep point
pulls the length back outside off after pre-empting another sweep attempt. SKY tries anyway but cops a blow on the body for his troubles
on the bounce! Angled in full on leg stump. Krishnamurthi has a slog at it and shanks it. Fortunately for him, it does not carry to deep mid wicket
back of a length outside off. SKY stays back before dabbing it towards backward point
back of a length on the stumps. Ranjane works it towards deep mid wicket
pushed in fuller on the pads. Eased out to deep mid wicket as SKY retains strike
back of a length just outside off. Krishnamurthi a little late on the back-foot swat and powers it towards long on

shortish outside off. SKY sits deep in his crease and cuts it past backward point. Mukkamalla with some handy work to his left on the fence. Well, scratch that because his foot is in contact with the cushion as he tries to haul it in!
on a length outside off. Krishnamurthi jabs it into the cover region and canters across
back of a length on leg stump. SKY goes back and stabs it towards deep mid wicket
incoming ball on a back of a length outside off. Ranjane stays rooted to his crease and can only defend
speared in very full just outside off. Axar loads up for the slog-sweep and drags it towards deep square leg
up, up and away! Given a bit of air outside off and Ranjane gives it more air. He bends his back knee, gets under it and clobbers it over long on!
fired in full on middle and off. Mohsin has a poke at it and squirts it off the inside edge towards short fine leg
that is SKY at his best! Slower ball dug into the track wide outside off. SKY shuffles across, fetches it and then smears it over square leg!
pushed in on a length on middle and leg. Ranjane has a prod at it and chunks it off the inside edge behind square
this is a terrific shot! The India captain has come to play! Missed yorker outside off and this lands in the slot. Serious whippage from SKY and he clubs this flat over wide long on!
length on middle and off. Mohsin stays back and taps it gently towards mid wicket
off-pace and short outside off. Ranjane goes back and across before slapping it towards sweeper cover

caught on the fence, and another boundary-rider leads to an Indian batter's downfall! Back of a length just outside off. Spins back in a smidgen and that cramps Axar for room as he looks to swipe at it. Off the inside half of the bat and Mohsin, stood a few yards inside the fence, takes it comfortably near his chest. India three wickets away from being bowled out now!
pushed across the batter on a length wide outside off. Mohsin nearly swishes himself off his feet but fails to lay bat on ball
darted in full on off. Arshseep almost gives it the full wind-up before tugging it straight to mid wicket
into the blockhole on leg stump. Mohsin jams down on it and digs it out towards long off
oh, hello! Dragged down outside off and this sits up really nicely. Arshdeep holds his shape and bangs it over the bowler's head!

Mohsin continues swinging and this time, it leads to his downfall! On the shorter side, angling into middle and leg. Mohsin is cramped for room on the pull and cannot free his arms adequately. Pops it off the higher part of the bat and Tilak completes the most regulation of catches at deep mid wicket!
into the blockhole outside off. Arshdeep jams down on it and clinks it back to the bowler. SKY has to scramble, just in case the ball deflected off the bowler's hand into the stumps
greeted by a sharp bumper on middle stump. SvS spots it early enough and ducks under it
excellent yorker on the stumps. Arshdeep digs it out to the bowler's left, who sprawls and stops it. But he gets up rather gingerly too. His knee might have buckled under him as he dived
zinged in full on middle and leg. SvS cannot get under it and clinks it all along the ground to long on
low full toss just outside off. Arshdeep winds up and drills it towards long on. Single not taken, rightly
going, going, gone! SvS misses the yorker outside off on the shorter side, and SKY pounces. He gets down on one knee and wallops it over deep square!
just over extra cover! Cutter on a back of a length outside off. Ranjane loses his shape completely as he swishes at this. Gets enough to clear Samson
full and wide again. SKY opens his bat face this time and slices it down to deep backward point
safe again! Pace-on now, short on off. Hurries onto Ranjane and he splices it into the spaces in the square leg region
sprayed a mile outside off. Arshdeep was standing outside off but that was still wide. This was almost on the adjacent strip
top yorker to finish the over. Just outside leg and SvS digs it out towards long on

Arshdeep swings, and Arshdeep departs! Slower ball on a length outside off. Arshdeep has a good-old swipe at and slices across it too much. The ball goes high up and Milind makes no mistake, standing well inside the long off fence!
